title: Stolzia peperomioides
taxonomy: Stolzia peperomioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to Madagascar, a tropical island country off the coast of East Africa. The Commelinaceae family consists of around 600 species of plants, commonly known as spiderworts or dayflowers. These plants are known for their diverse range of growth habits, leaf shapes, and flower colors. Stolzia peperomioides is one of the lesser-known species within this family, but it shares many characteristics with its more common relatives.
